quote: What story about yourself would you have to retire in order to grow into the life you want?
author: James Clear
explanation: A prompt to identify the narrative you need to release so you can grow into the life you want

quote: What needs to happen for me to look back in December and consider the year a success?
intro: On defining success for the year
author: James Clear
explanation: A prompt to identify what would make this year meaningful and successful in your own eyes

quote:
Which activities, if doubled, would make your life meaningfully better?

Which activities, if halved, would make your life meaningfully better?
author: James Clear
explanation: A prompt to identify which activities deserve more of your time and which deserve less

quote: Are you continuing to do it mostly because it makes you feel interested and alive — or are you continuing to do it mostly because you know what to expect and you're hesitant to make a change?
author: James Clear
explanation: A prompt to examine whether you're continuing out of genuine aliveness or simply because change feels uncertain

quote: If you met your 80-year-old self today, what would they beg you to stop postponing?
author: James Clear
explanation: A prompt to identify what your future self would urge you to start doing now rather than delaying
